description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to the master branch and on all pull requests. Use a matrix job strategy to test on multiple operating systems (Ubuntu, MacOS, Windows) and Python versions (3.6 to 3.10), excluding Windows with Python 3.6. For each job, check out the code, set up the corresponding Python version, install Poetry, configure it, set up caching, install dependencies, generate code from proto files, and execute the test suite with pytest.
